title: Query result may be wrong when use `like` to do index range scan on PAD SPACE column
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
create table t(a varchar(20) collate utf8mb4_bin, index ia(a));
insert into t value('ęµ‹čÆ•'),('ęµ‹čÆ•  ');
select *,length(a) from t where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ• %';
select *,length(a) from t where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ•';
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

From mysql:
```
> select *,length(a) from t where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ• %';
+----------+-----------+
| a        | length(a) |
+----------+-----------+
| ęµ‹čÆ•     |         8 |
+----------+-----------+

> select *,length(a) from t where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ•';
+--------+-----------+
| a      | length(a) |
+--------+-----------+
| ęµ‹čÆ•   |         6 |
+--------+-----------+
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
> select *,length(a) from t use index () where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ• %';
+----------+-----------+
| a        | length(a) |
+----------+-----------+
| ęµ‹čÆ•     |         8 |
+----------+-----------+

> select *,length(a) from t use index (ia) where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ• %';
+----------+-----------+
| a        | length(a) |
+----------+-----------+
| ęµ‹čÆ•     |         6 |
| ęµ‹čÆ•     |         8 |
+----------+-----------+

> select *,length(a) from t use index () where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ•';
+--------+-----------+
| a      | length(a) |
+--------+-----------+
| ęµ‹čÆ•   |         6 |
+--------+-----------+

> select *,length(a) from t use index (ia) where a like 'ęµ‹čÆ•';
+----------+-----------+
| a        | length(a) |
+----------+-----------+
| ęµ‹čÆ•     |         6 |
| ęµ‹čÆ•     |         8 |
+----------+-----------+
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

From v6.0.0 to latest master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a String, b Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
SELECT *, LENGTH(a) FROM t1 WHERE a LIKE 'ęµ‹čÆ• %';
SELECT *, LENGTH(a) FROM t1 WHERE b IS NULL OR a LIKE 'ęµ‹čÆ•';
SELECT a, LENGTH(a) FROM t1 WHERE a LIKE 'ęµ‹čÆ•  ';
key_bug_features: Index range scan on PAD SPACE column with `like`
